item.title: Sharing the love and the bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
@Zipperkiller
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@Anbaric
October is right around the corner, and I can't wait to team up with Imgur again to panhandle for Extra-Life! We had so much fun completing our dumb and chaotic milestone challenges last year. This year will be bigger than ever! We will be holding an auction where any and all creators in the BSC can donate pieces for members to bid on. 100% of the funds raised will support Extra-Life. If you are a creator who would like to help us #spreadthelove this year, pick up the @creator role on https://discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka for more details.
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Smiley Hiley tax. Looking for more memes? discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Comparison of me before and after transitioning. I feel so much like myself now!
item.dc:creator: Vylpesxyz

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL actually Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends.. must have been injecting too many weeds when i made the last dump title.. sorry for any confusion (sunday's was titled monday)
pretty i've eaten ice cream in the winter, at night ?
mmm hmm
luckily i moved away from my hometown
i'm here for this
must look at creatures
i would die for jennifer slopez
i forgot how violent this movie is
as is tradition
better clean that up
not a fan of clowns
i guess
it's just like.. it's just like .. a mini... mall
please just don't try to correct the grammar/spelling here
especially the wasps
i've been attacked
please
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Hello world
item.description: Follow-up unpopular opinion puffin: up-votes only mean anything if you use down-votes much more aggressively. Like. not just a little bit but a lot.

item.title: The Seventeenthst, #2 Edition: Architectural Superiority, Electric Poogaloo
item.description:
Hey babe, you're doing great. Keep pushing.
Behold my field of dreams.
And now, onto the carpet.
Finally. Carpeted Toilet.
Isn't it so lovely? Anyway, onto the battlepoopers.
And now, for poopers on the go.
This eyetest is impossible to pass. I guess I'll just shit on the floor.

item.title: Memes vol 315 X-men
item.description:
Do you want The Boys? Because this is how you get The Boys
TRANS KURT TRANS KURT
BARK BARK BARK BARK
I made this one! My boyfriend said this one day and I was like “who do we know that’s named Scott”… and so yeah I’m actually friends with Logan
The 2nd version
He looks so friendly
BWAAAAHHHH BARK BARK BARK THE DUALITY OF MAN
I love Doug so much- he’s literally just a little guy
My next cosplay hopefully
Liza Jane, Froggy, and Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.title: I keep seeing this photo pop up in my newsfeeds
item.description:
You can see a full resolution version of the photo here: https://www.nasa.gov/image-detail/iss071e170351/ The news is saying "Astronaut photographs mysterious orbs far below space station" THERE'S NOTHING MYSTERIOUS ABOUT THIS, JFC! Ok, calm down... let's just go over this as simply as possible.
First of all, the "orbs" aren't orbs, they're lightning.
Zooming in on the largest blob we see this.
This seems to be making news outlets freak out the most. This is nothing out of the ordinary, but you don't normally see it from the ground because it tends to happen in the upper atmosphere, far above clouds where lightning is going off.
They're called "sprites" and sometimes referred to as "red lightning". Now, when I say "you don't normally", this is absolutely true, but sometimes you can see it, because it sometimes happens when the sky is clear.
There's actually a whole bunch of things you don't normally see from the ground. Blue jets, tendrils, sprites, and elves. Here's some more photos of sprites from space.
Notice the lightning flash below it
Again with more lightning flash.
Here's the lightning flash creating them being visible on the horizon, behind the clouds. Remember, sprites are in the mesosphere, so these aren't as close as they might seem in the photo. They're actually directly above that bright flash of lightning that's so far over the horizon.
Here's some more depictions of various types of weather phenomenon you might see, along with the elves and sprites. There's also trolls, gigantic jets, blue starters, and halos. Elves btw are an expanding ring. It's a very rare phenomenon that I've yet to witness myself. I've also never seen a troll or blue jet. I have however seen sprites and halos with my own eyes.
The best way to see them, though, is of course from space.
Here's a photo of one of those "gigantic jets" mentioned in the last illustrative diagram, ironically taken from a jumbo jet.
Here's multiple gigantic jets photographed in the Himilayas. This was done with a long exposure which is why the sky is bright despite having stars in it, and why there's multiple.
item.dc:creator: BerryBnuuy

item.title: Date night with the wife and weight loss progress!
item.description:
Date night! June 2021 was pre-op for both of us. Wife had gastric bypass (RNY) in September 2021. I had duodenal switch (DS) in August 2021.
Hello nurse! err? Hello sunshine!
She?s such a cutie.
Here?s a full-sizes shot. This is at Disney Springs in Orlando, FL.
That?s me. I don?t have many full body shots of just me. My high weight was 350. My lowest weight was 175. I saw 200.8 pounds a week or two and freaked the heck out. I?ve been back to avoiding carbs and increased my exercise.
We shared an appetizer of butter garlic shrimp and then a dinner of some kind of lemon chicken. I was surprised at how good it was!
For dinner was a small No Way Jose that we still threw away a portion of it.
She?s such a cutie. (originally posted by @learntorv on 2023-07-17 13:46:34)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Cue the panic
item.description:
I’m a “worker” in my field, usually these events are for the bigwigs. I don’t think “what happens in Vegas stays in Vegas” applies as far as these things are concerned but I will be promptly drinking when it concludes!
It pays the cat tax

item.title: The most uplifting person I know: Mr. Puckett
item.description:
Nov. 2020
2023
Helping the homeless and low income pet owners everywhere he goes
Nashville
Mr. Puckett = Free Pizza Dude
Uplifting
12,000 meals delivered back in Sep 2023
